meaning: n.社会主义,社会主义运动
examples: William Morris was one of the early prophets of socialism.
While some Socialists did view price protests as a direct step toward socialism, most Socialists ultimately sought to divert the cost-of-living movement into alternative channels of protest.
He had decided long ago that he would put his trust in socialism when the time came.
Municipal socialism may seem an odd strategy for the world's capital of capitalism to embrace.
In December, Morales' Movement to Socialism party won almost 54 percent of the popular vote.
